title: Building Scalable Web Applications with Flask and Docker

Setting up a production-ready Flask structure
Writing an optimized Dockerfile with multi-stage builds

title: Modern React Patterns You Should Know in 2024

Custom hooks for logic reuse (useFetch, useLocalStorage)

State reducer pattern for controlled components

title: Mastering Python Async/Await: A Practical Guide
excerpt: Dive deep into Python's asyncio library, understanding event loops, coroutines, and best practices for asynchronous programming.

Creating and managing tasks with asyncio.create_task()
Using asyncio.gather() vs asyncio.wait() vs asyncio.as_completed()

Integrating async code with sync code (run_in_executor)

title: Docker Best Practices for Development and Production

title: Building RESTful APIs with FastAPI: Beyond the Basics
excerpt: Take your FastAPI skills to the next level with dependency injection, background tasks, WebSockets, and production-ready patterns.

outline: Index types: B-tree, Hash, GIN, GiST (when to use which)

title: GraphQL vs REST: A Practical Comparison
excerpt: Deep dive into GraphQL and REST API patterns, comparing their strengths, weaknesses, and ideal use cases.
outline: REST: Resource-based architecture and HTTP methods
GraphQL: Single endpoint, query language, and schema
Versioning strategies (REST URLs vs GraphQL deprecation)
Performance: Over-fetching, under-fetching, and N+1 problem
Caching strategies (HTTP caching vs Apollo Client)
Real-time data: WebSockets with GraphQL subscriptions
Tooling ecosystem (Postman vs GraphiQL, Apollo Studio)
When to choose what: decision framework

Git objects: blobs, trees, commits, and annotated tags
How Git stores content (SHA-1 hashing and compression)
The three stages: working directory, staging area, repository
How branches and references work internally
Rebasing vs merging: what actually happens
